steps.title: Use the two function values
steps.content: The values $h(0)=41$ and $h(1)=40$ give two points on the line: $(0,41)$ and $(1,40)$.

steps.title: Find the slope and intercept
steps.content: The slope is $$m=(40-41)/(1-0)=-1.$$ Since $h(0)=41$, the $y$-intercept is $41$.

steps.title: Write the function
steps.content: A linear function with slope $-1$ and intercept $41$ is $$h(x)=-x+41.$$ A is correct.
